checkin.journal:
Great sleep - with earthquake and cosita waking me up in the mid of the night not sure if I would wake up by myself, was a little scary but was sleepy enough to fall back asleep
Breakfast with bread was awesome 🤩 loaded on some good carbs here
Hiking with alex peter and etienne 🚶‍♂️ 
Lunch with cosita in Loa was not good experience at all due to them messing up with all food - started with fly in the wine
Was exploring on my health what could be reason for my issue and one reason I found new one
